- React agent - needs query
- you can use only "output" property of prev.
- max run time of workflow by default 300 sec - not enough
- react - you can use plugin but not specific apis
- no output as markdown or html, so line breaks not preserved
- no path through node
- sandbox on windows - you can't run with large inputs or large code
- output to Telegram is only 4096 chars
- workflow never finishes
- output result in GUI is limited by num of chars
